contact.title: Contact us

contact.questionsDesc: For any questions about events, registration or the community.
contact.sponsoringDesc: Support the Vue Montreal community by becoming a sponsor. Several tiers available (Platinum, Gold, Silver, Bronze).
contact.speakerDesc: Have an idea for a presentation? Submit your topic.
contact.hostDesc: Your company can host a meetup? Contact us to discuss.

home.title: Welcome to Vue Montreal
home.subtitle: Montreal's Vue.js community
home.heroDesc: Meetups, talks and networking around Vue.js in Montreal.
home.eventsSubtitle: Join us for our upcoming meetups
home.communityDesc: Vue Montreal brings together developers and Vue/Nuxt learners to learn, share, and build together. Whether you're a beginner or an expert, you'll find your place here.
home.communityCardConnectDesc: Meet Vue/Nuxt developers from Montreal and beyond
home.communityCardLearnDesc: Technical talks, in-depth discussions, and concrete real-world experience
home.communityCardContributeDesc: Propose a talk, co-organize a meetup, and help the community grow
home.whyJoinCard1Desc: An inclusive, welcoming space where knowledge flows freely and every member matters
home.whyJoinCard2Desc: High-quality talks, honest discussions, and modern practices around Vue, Nuxt, and the frontend ecosystem
home.whyJoinCard3Desc: The bridge between the Montreal Vue scene and the global Vue ecosystem
home.sponsorsDesc: Thanks to our partners who support the community.

about.headerSubtitle: The Vue.js community building the North American ecosystem.
about.historyText: Vue Montreal was born from the belief that a strong Vue.js community deserves to exist in North America. Relaunched in 2025 after several years of dormancy, it brings together passionate developers around regular meetups, technical talks, and a growing network with every edition. Our ambition: to become the North American equivalent of Vue Amsterdam.
about.whatCard1Desc: Technical talks, networking, and exchanges in a friendly atmosphere
about.whatCard2Desc: YouTube replays, resources, and recap posts after every event
about.whatCard3Desc: International speakers, partnerships, and cross-community collaborations
about.joinDesc: Discover, learn, and connect with the Vue.js community in Montreal.
